name: scaffold_generator
description: Generate project scaffolding from templates. Creates directory structures, boilerplate files, configuration, and starter code for various project types. In task-aware runs, the scaffold should target the task's app/ directory. Pass list_templates=true to see available templates.

template.description: Template to use for scaffolding. Available: python_cli, python_api, node_api, react_app.

name.description: Project or module name (used for directories and imports).

project_dir.description: Project directory where the scaffold will be created. Preferred over output. Defaults to the active task's app/ directory when available.

description.description: Short description of the project (used in generated files).

list_templates.description: If true, list available templates and exit.

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
